---
title: "Studio"
listing:
  contents:
    - "posts/**/*.qmd"
    - "posts/**/*.md"
    - "posts/**/*.ipynb"
    # Hide AI-generated companion posts from the front page (still reachable by URL):
    - "!posts/**/AI Auto Blog Post Logistic Regression.md"
    - "!posts/**/Group_chat.md"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed:
    title: "Studio"
    description: "AI studio explorations and experiments by Aneesh Sathe."
    language: "en-us"
    type: full
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
